subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the divine fragrances! Praise be to God that thou art quickened by the breezes from the gardens of the realities of the Abhá Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب بنفحات الله حمد خدارا که بنسیم حدائق حقائق ملکوت ابهی زنده
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @law of pilgrimage, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement
